description: In Sophie Mackintosh’s novel “Permanence,” cheating couples find themselves in an alternate world free of complication — and missing the mess.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘How It Feels to Be Alive,’ by Megan O’Grady
book_title: ‘How It Feels to Be Alive,’ by Megan O’Grady
description: “How It Feels to Be Alive,” by Megan O’Grady, blends criticism with personal history to explore how and why art affects us.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Palm House,’ by Gwendoline Riley
description: In “The Palm House,” Gwendoline Riley offers understated yet cleareyed observations of human behavior — this time about middle-aged Londoners struggling to stay relevant.
